## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / chore
- [ ] Breaking change

## How tested

- [ ] `cargo test` (if Rust touched)
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` (if UI touched)
- [ ] Manual UI path:

## Checklist

- [ ] No real secrets / personal paths
- [ ] User-facing docs updated if needed
